meaning: 麦纳麦[巴林首都](或译马纳马)
examples: Middle East Field Office, Manama, Bahrain.
They also made a presentation at the district conference in Manama , Bahrain.
Company employees will perform the work primarily in Naples, Italy, and Manama, Bahrain.
Cardiff came ahead of Bern in Switzerland, Manama in Bahrain and Blantyre in Malawi.
Mr Rajab was arrested on 5 May at Manama airport on his return from the Lebanese capital, Beirut.
